builds.name: 21 Pop Scouts
builds.summary: Standard opening into scouts with smooth food economy.

steps.title: Start
steps.instruction: 6 villagers on sheep. Keep town center producing villagers.

steps.title: Lumber setup
steps.instruction: Send villagers 7-10 to wood and build a lumber camp.

steps.title: Boar timing
steps.instruction: Villager 11 lures the first boar. Keep sheep villagers under TC.

steps.title: Food stabilizes
steps.instruction: Villagers 12-13 to boar/sheep food under the TC.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send villagers 14-17 to berries and build a mill.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Lure the second boar before the first is nearly finished.

steps.title: More wood
steps.instruction: Villagers 19-20 to wood. Seed farms with weak food villagers when wood allows.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Click up to Feudal Age. Move 3-4 food villagers to wood during uptime.

steps.title: Feudal buildings
steps.instruction: Build barracks on the way up, then stable immediately in Feudal.

steps.title: Scout pressure
steps.instruction: Research double-bit axe, make scouts, add farms, then consider horse collar.

builds.name: 22 Pop Archers
builds.summary: Clean archer opening with early fletching pressure.

steps.title: Start
steps.instruction: 6 villagers on sheep and constant villager production.

steps.title: Wood core
steps.instruction: Villagers 7-10 to wood with a lumber camp.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Villager 11 lures first boar, then continue food under TC.

steps.title: Boar/sheep
steps.instruction: Villagers 12-13 gather food under the TC.

steps.title: Berries
steps.instruction: Villagers 14-17 to berries with a mill.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Lure second boar and keep food income tight.

steps.title: Gold setup
steps.instruction: Villagers 19-20 to gold and build a mining camp.

steps.title: Final Dark Age eco
steps.instruction: Villager 21 to wood and villager 22 to gold or wood depending on resources.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Click up to Feudal. Build barracks during uptime.

steps.title: Two ranges
steps.instruction: In Feudal, build one or two ranges, research double-bit axe, then fletching.

steps.title: Pressure
steps.instruction: Produce archers steadily, add blacksmith, keep adding farms behind it.

builds.name: 27+2 Fast Castle
builds.summary: Safer economy-focused opening into a strong Castle Age timing.

steps.title: Start
steps.instruction: 6 villagers on sheep and keep TC working.

steps.title: Wood line
steps.instruction: Villagers 7-10 to wood with lumber camp.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Villager 11 lures first boar.

steps.title: More food
steps.instruction: Villagers 12-15 gather boar/sheep food.

steps.title: Berries
steps.instruction: Villagers 16-19 to berries with a mill.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Lure second boar and avoid TC idle time.

steps.title: Wood and farms
steps.instruction: Villagers 21-24 to wood; start farms as wood allows.

steps.title: Gold
steps.instruction: Villagers 25-27 to gold and build a mining camp.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Click Feudal. During uptime, balance toward farms and gold.

steps.title: Market blacksmith
steps.instruction: In Feudal, make 2 villagers, build market and blacksmith.

steps.title: Click Castle
steps.instruction: Click Castle Age when you have 800 food and 200 gold.

steps.title: Castle transition
steps.instruction: Add TCs, knights, monks, or unique unit plan based on matchup.
